name: Product Landing Page
description: Complete product marketing landing page composition. Dark premium aesthetic with vibrant geometric accents, split hero, problem visualization, feature pipeline showcase, and conversion-optimized CTA flow. Derived from the Decantr brand homepage.
personality: Bold, high-impact product landing page designed to convert. Dark premium background with vibrant geometric accent elements. Split hero with confident headline and product visualization. Before-after comparisons in browser frames sell the transformation. Pipeline cards showcase the workflow with numbered steps. Tech pills display integrations and compatibility. The overall rhythm alternates between full-bleed visual sections and contained content. Every scroll position has a conversion opportunity.

voice.tone: Bold, confident, and technically credible. Makes strong claims backed by specifics. No fluff.
voice.empty_states: N/A for landing pages — all content is authored, not user-generated.
voice.errors: Minimal. Form submission errors should be inline and specific. Never break the conversion flow.
voice.loading: Hero content loads instantly (SSR/SSG). Below-fold sections fade in on scroll intersection. No loading states visible to users.
